title: OpenCL Example
description: OpenCL Example documents opencl example material for OpenCL for C++ in the language domain. It is classified as an operation page for the library class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Platform informations, and SAXPY, CPU vs. GPU or Mali-GPU, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include c++, opencl, mali, saxpy, and opencl example, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is language / cpp / opencl / opencl-example, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation.
